My ex used to get angry at the way I dressed.

Not because it was disrespectful.
Not because it was inappropriate.

Because he was insecure.

He would say things like
“Why are you wearing that?”
“Who are you trying to impress?”
“Change before we go out.”

At first I thought it meant he cared.

But control is not love.

When a man is insecure, the first thing he tries to control is a woman’s freedom.
Her clothes.
Her body.
Her confidence.

And the scary part is… many women start adapting without even realizing it.

You start choosing outfits based on how he might react.
You start covering parts of yourself.
You start shrinking just to keep the peace.

That’s not a relationship.
That’s emotional control.

A secure man doesn’t police a woman’s outfit.
He trusts her.

If a dress threatens your masculinity… the problem isn’t the dress. ❤️

3. B-stance banded hip thrusts into hip bridges!!
